hero_tagline: "A day of unity and celebration for the African diaspora."
next_event_desc: Join us for the first BJuneteenth community meet-up — a gathering bringing together members of the Black diaspora as we begin preparing for Juneteenth Barcelona 2026. Connection, collaboration, and building momentum together. DJ Chanti takes over at 22:00.
next_event_meta: 📍 The Station Bar, Carrer de Sant Bertran 14, Ciutat Vella
next_event_series: Part of a monthly series on the 19th of each month.
detail_tickets_sub: Register your interest below and we'll notify you when tickets are available.
schedule_empty: Full schedule coming soon — check back closer to the event.
venue_body: Located in El Poblenou — one of Barcelona's most creative and innovative neighborhoods — La Fábrica & Co offers beautifully designed spaces perfect for community events. Surrounded by cafés, cultural spaces, and the tech companies of the 22@ district, it's minutes from Barcelona's best beaches.
venue_address:
La Fábrica & Co
Doctor Trueta, 191
08005 Barcelona
El Poblenou
register_sub: Volunteer, sponsor, perform, or simply attend. All are welcome.
